description: Fine-tune SOTA open legal NLP models and general-purpose models on NZ legislative and Hansard corpora. Covers Legal-BERT, SaulLM, Gemma, Phi-4, Qwen, Mistral, Exaone, MiniCPM5, Liquid, Kimi.
oracle_notes: Repo-side Track 20 implementation and closeout evidence are complete: training data preparation, task examples, MLM collator, metrics, Legal-BERT/QLoRA job specs, dry-run CLI evidence, fine-tuning scripts, dependency declarations, focused tests, and environment-adaptive runtime planning. Local gate evidence finds 519 Parquet inputs, importable training dependencies, and the hf CLI in the Pixi runtime. This workstation selects a bounded local_cpu plan; CI=true selects a ci_cpu plan suitable for GitHub Actions. Full-scale model-quality claims remain pending until bounded smoke training is extended into measured training/evaluation and, for large QLoRA jobs, a suitable accelerated backend is available.
